title: austrobuxus horneanus
intro: Austrobuxus horneanus, also known as the New Caledonian box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Austrobuxus horneanus has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting wound healing.
